evals.prompt: Build a KMP shared module for user authentication. It needs: login/register API calls via Ktor, secure token storage (Keychain on iOS, EncryptedSharedPrefs on Android), and a UserSession StateFlow observable by the UI layer. Use Koin for DI.
evals.expected_output: commonMain auth module with Ktor client, expect/actual for token storage, Koin DI, StateFlow

assertions.name: common_main_code
assertions.description: Auth logic in commonMain, not platform-specific

assertions.name: expect_actual_storage
assertions.description: expect/actual for token storage (Keychain vs EncryptedSharedPrefs)

assertions.name: ktor_client
assertions.description: Ktor HttpClient configured in commonMain

assertions.name: koin_di
assertions.description: Koin module for auth dependencies

assertions.name: state_flow
assertions.description: UserSession exposed as StateFlow for UI observation

evals.prompt: Create a KMP data layer with SQLDelight for offline-first storage. Models: Task (id, title, status, dueDate, syncStatus). Need CRUD operations, a sync manager that queues offline writes, and a repository that reads from cache first.
evals.expected_output: SQLDelight schema, repository with offline-first logic, sync queue, platform database drivers

assertions.name: sqldelight_schema
assertions.description: SQLDelight .sq file defining Task table

assertions.name: repository_pattern
assertions.description: Repository reads from local cache, falls back to API

assertions.name: sync_queue
assertions.description: Offline writes queued for sync when connectivity returns

assertions.name: expect_actual_driver
assertions.description: expect/actual for SQLDelight driver (Android vs Native)

assertions.name: common_test
assertions.description: Tests in commonTest covering repository logic

evals.prompt: Build a Compose Multiplatform UI screen for a product catalog. Grid layout on tablet, list on phone. Each product shows image, name, price, and an add-to-cart button. Handle loading, error, and empty states.
evals.expected_output: Composable functions with responsive layout, state handling, and platform-adaptive behavior

assertions.name: compose_multiplatform
assertions.description: Uses Compose Multiplatform composables (not platform-specific Views/UIKit)

assertions.name: responsive_layout
assertions.description: Different layouts for phone vs tablet based on screen size

assertions.name: state_handling
assertions.description: Loading, error, and empty states all handled

assertions.name: product_card
assertions.description: Product card with image, name, price, button

assertions.name: state_flow_collection
assertions.description: Collects StateFlow from ViewModel for reactive UI

evals.prompt: Implement expect/actual for a camera barcode scanner in KMP. Android should use CameraX + ML Kit, iOS should use AVFoundation + Vision. The shared API should be a suspend function scan(): String that returns the barcode value.
evals.expected_output: expect class in commonMain, actual implementations for Android and iOS, Koin registration

assertions.name: expect_declaration
assertions.description: expect class or function in commonMain with suspend scan(): String

assertions.name: android_actual
assertions.description: actual implementation in androidMain using CameraX/ML Kit

assertions.name: ios_actual
assertions.description: actual implementation in iosMain using AVFoundation/Vision

assertions.name: koin_injection
assertions.description: Platform-specific instance registered in Koin

assertions.name: shared_api
assertions.description: commonMain code can call scanner without knowing the platform

evals.prompt: Set up a KMP project structure for a new cross-platform app. Shared modules: core (networking, storage, DI), feature-auth, feature-tasks. Platform targets: Android, iOS. Use Ktor, SQLDelight, Koin, and Compose Multiplatform.
evals.expected_output: Multi-module KMP project structure with proper source sets and dependency configuration

assertions.name: multi_module
assertions.description: Separate Gradle modules for core, feature-auth, feature-tasks

assertions.name: source_sets
assertions.description: commonMain, androidMain, iosMain source sets configured

assertions.name: ktor_dependency
assertions.description: Ktor client in core module with platform engines

assertions.name: sqldelight_dependency
assertions.description: SQLDelight in core with platform drivers

assertions.name: compose_multiplatform
assertions.description: Compose Multiplatform UI dependency configured
